name: diagGetCurrentEcu
title: diagGetCurrentEcu
description: Gets the qualifier of the ECU for which the last event was processed, especially if a response was received from this ECU. This function can be used to determine the ECU that responded to a functional request.

In a diagnostics event handler in the measurement setup this function will return the target of request primitives and the source of response primitives (the other communication partner is always a tester).
return: Error code or length of the name provided.
